name: seekquarry/atto
description:
Single-file, pure-PHP servers and routing engines:
        HTTP/1.1+2, gopher, SMTP/IMAP, DNS, FTP, SSH/SFTP, STUN/TURN.

suggest.ext-mbstring:
Charset conversion for MIME-encoded mail headers in
            MailSite (non-UTF-8/US-ASCII parts).
suggest.ext-posix:
Privilege drop after binding privileged ports in WebSite
            and GopherSite.
suggest.ext-ffi:
Required for the optional HTTP/3 listener (loads
            libquiche via FFI).
suggest.ext-sockets:
Tunes UDP buffer sizes on the HTTP/3 listener;
            optional even when FFI is present.
